overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, palm-lined streets, and elevated pedestrian walkways. The character walks along sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and ascends multi-level stairs past glowing advertisements and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon-lit buildings and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated bollards and palm trees

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk
green sports car driving past on the multi-lane street

entered.detail: tall cylindrical white glowing bollards lining the street edge with teal accent lighting
tropical palm trees planted along the sidewalk in large planters
tall building with distinctive teal neon horizontal lines and glass facade
illuminated walk sign showing yellow pedestrian symbol on a black pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at night, lined with glowing white bollards and palm trees. The camera moves forward past a pedestrian signal as vehicles including a green sports car drive by on the left. A tall skyscraper with teal neon accents dominates the left side of the street.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full height of the neon-lit skyscraper
stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to look up at the towering building facade, then proceeding to cross the intersection

notable_agents.action: person crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: broad yellow zebra crossing markings on the dark asphalt road
large illuminated building facade with bright white panels and signage visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching the intersection, the camera tilts up to reveal the full height of the neon-lit skyscraper before descending to cross the street. The scene transitions from the sidewalk onto the yellow-striped crosswalk, with a white building featuring large illuminated panels visible across the road.

events.description: olive green military-style truck drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward a wide exterior stairway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: military truck with large wheels driving past on the street
person ascending the concrete stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to an elevated pedestrian level
tall vertical illuminated advertisement screen on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera proceeds along the sidewalk toward a wide exterior stairway. An olive military truck passes by on the left while pedestrians are seen ascending the stairs ahead. A large digital billboard is visible on the right-side building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway between buildings leading to upper plaza

events.description: beginning to ascend the concrete stairs to the upper level
emerging from the enclosed stairwell to a brighter area with intense neon signage

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs toward the elevated pedestrian plaza, passing descending pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person walking down the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: silver metal railings with horizontal bars lining both sides of the stairway
elevated walkway area with bright neon signs visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera begins ascending the wide concrete stairs, transitioning from the open street to a more enclosed stairwell with metal railings. As the climb continues, bright neon signage becomes visible at the top, indicating the approach to an upper pedestrian plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with neon advertisements and overhead walkways

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper plaza area with SEOCHO signage

agents.ego_description: climbing the final flight of stairs toward the illuminated upper plaza with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two people walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated white neon sign reading SEOCHO mounted on the building facade
large vertical red advertisement with Japanese text and a face illustration
elevated bridge structure with neon lighting connecting buildings across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent to the upper plaza, revealing a vibrant space dominated by a large white SEOCHO neon sign and a prominent red Japanese billboard. The camera approaches an overhead walkway connecting the buildings, surrounded by intense neon lighting and digital advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city sidewalk, crossing a busy intersection and ascending toward a vibrant upper pedestrian plaza. It begins by moving past glowing white bollards and palm trees, gliding alongside a teal-accented skyscraper as a green sports car passes by. As the camera reaches the intersection, it tilts upward to capture the tower's height before descending to cross a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a building with large illuminated panels. The scene then shifts toward a wide exterior stairway, passing an olive military truck and pedestrians before the camera begins climbing the concrete steps into a more enclosed stairwell with metal railings. Finally, the ascent opens into a brilliant plaza dominated by a large white SEOCHO neon sign and a red Japanese billboard, ending as the camera approaches an overhead walkway surrounded by intense digital advertisements.
